related_requirements.requirement: User accesses the portal through authentication with personal credentials.
related_requirements.explanation: The Leader acts as the central routing point and incorporates security mechanisms to block unauthorized connection attempts, ensuring secure entry.

related_requirements.requirement: User accesses applications from the portal list; if accessing only one application, they are redirected to its main page; if multiple, they select the application to access.
related_requirements.explanation: The Leader manages traffic flow and routes requests from the Portal gateways to the corresponding internal microservices.

related_requirements.requirement: System must allow creation, query, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users via a secure authentication and permission verification mechanism.
related_requirements.explanation: The Leader applies security protocols to prevent vulnerabilities and ensures ordered and secure interactions between external services and internal microservices.

related_requirements.requirement: Web application must support a large number of simultaneous users without degrading its performance.
related_requirements.explanation: As the central routing point, the Leader manages traffic flow between external services and internal microservices, helping to handle load distribution.

related_requirements.requirement: Application architecture is based on microservices.
related_requirements.explanation: The Leader is described as a microservice without a user interface that coordinates with other internal microservices.

related_requirements.requirement: Communication protocol is HTTP and data format is JSON.
related_requirements.explanation: The Leader receives requests and routes them, functioning within the HTTP/JSON communication protocol defined for the system.

related_requirements.requirement: User accesses the portal through authentication with personal credentials.
related_requirements.explanation: The Portal serves as the centralized entry point for users to access different VWGS applications through web browsers.

related_requirements.requirement: System displays the list of applications to which the user has access upon logging in.
related_requirements.explanation: The Portal hosts the frontend binaries for the portal itself and other applications, providing the interface to display these lists.

related_requirements.requirement: User accesses applications from the portal list; if accessing only one application, they are redirected to its main page; if multiple, they select the application to access.
related_requirements.explanation: Users access the system via this component, which interacts with the Leader microservice for routing before granting access to internal applications.

related_requirements.requirement: New content must maintain visual coherence with the design of the old application version (design, colors, typography, organization).
related_requirements.explanation: The Portal provides a unified experience and hosts the frontend binaries, ensuring presentation consistency.

related_requirements.requirement: System must be easy to use for any user (80% of users do not need to ask for help from a third party).
related_requirements.explanation: By providing a unified experience and centralized entry point, the Portal contributes to ease of use.

related_requirements.requirement: Frontend is developed using Angular (Single-Page Application).
related_requirements.explanation: The Portal microservice contains the necessary binaries for the frontend (Angular).

related_requirements.requirement: User accesses the portal through authentication with personal credentials.
related_requirements.explanation: This component manages user authentication and verifies user identity.

related_requirements.requirement: System restricts data visualization and actions (create, modify, delete) based on the roles assigned to the user.
related_requirements.explanation: It determines access rights based on defined roles and policies, managing granular permissions.

related_requirements.requirement: System guarantees that users cannot access data belonging to other clients; only data of the associated client is shown.
related_requirements.explanation: It manages granular permissions per brand and cluster type, enforcing access boundaries.

related_requirements.requirement: Administrator assigns or revokes application access for users via the Commercial Cloud application.
related_requirements.explanation: It is responsible for creating and maintaining roles used to assign access.

related_requirements.requirement: Authorizations and Cluster assigned to a user must be of the same Cluster type as the user.
related_requirements.explanation: The data model involves entities like User, Cluster, and Role to manage permissions per cluster type.

related_requirements.requirement: Authorizations assigned to a user must belong to some of the brands contained in the associated Cluster.
related_requirements.explanation: It manages granular permissions per brand and cluster type, ensuring authorization alignment.

related_requirements.requirement: System must allow creation, query, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users via a secure authentication and permission verification mechanism.
related_requirements.explanation: It verifies user identity and determines access rights, forming the core of the permission verification mechanism.

related_requirements.requirement: Application must manage a strict separation of data for each client (no user can access data of other clients).
related_requirements.explanation: Permissions are managed per brand and cluster type, supporting strict data separation.

related_requirements.requirement: Web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation with a minimum availability of 99.9%.
related_requirements.explanation: It documents every interaction for incident resolution, contributing to system stability analysis.

related_requirements.requirement: System must allow creation, query, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users via a secure authentication and permission verification mechanism.
related_requirements.explanation: It acts as a traceability and audit mechanism, supporting security compliance.

related_requirements.requirement: Dates must be valid and cannot be later than the present.
related_requirements.explanation: Used for maintenance tasks such as cleaning old logs, which relates to date management.

related_requirements.requirement: Web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation with a minimum availability of 99.9%.
related_requirements.explanation: Executes monitoring tasks to verify microservice status, ensuring operational stability.

related_requirements.requirement: New content must maintain visual coherence with the design of the old application version (design, colors, typography, organization).
related_requirements.explanation: Responsible for the presentation and user experience, encapsulating interface logic and design.

related_requirements.requirement: System must be easy to use for any user (80% of users do not need to ask for help from a third party).
related_requirements.explanation: Focuses on user experience and interface logic to facilitate usability.

related_requirements.requirement: Application must be available in several languages with complete and correct translations.
related_requirements.explanation: As the presentation layer, it handles the display of translated content to the user.

related_requirements.requirement: User must be able to perform new operations without special training (learning time should not exceed 5 minutes).
related_requirements.explanation: The UI updates dynamically without reloading the page, improving the learning curve.

related_requirements.requirement: Query operations must have a load time under 1 second (response time must not exceed 1 second in 95% of queries).
related_requirements.explanation: Sends HTTP requests and receives responses, directly impacting perceived query load time.

related_requirements.requirement: Frontend is developed using Angular (Single-Page Application).
related_requirements.explanation: Developed using Angular 11+ and TypeScript following the MVVM pattern as a Single-Page Application.

related_requirements.requirement: Communication protocol is HTTP and data format is JSON.
related_requirements.explanation: Sends HTTP requests to the Backend Server using REST APIs and JSON format.

related_requirements.requirement: Query operations must have a load time under 1 second (response time must not exceed 1 second in 95% of queries).
related_requirements.explanation: Handles business logic and data access, directly influencing response time.

related_requirements.requirement: System must allow creation, query, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users via a secure authentication and permission verification mechanism.
related_requirements.explanation: Handles business logic, security, and data integrity, exposing the API for these operations.

related_requirements.requirement: Application architecture is based on microservices.
related_requirements.explanation: Built with Spring Boot following a layered architecture typical of microservices.

related_requirements.requirement: Backend is developed using Spring Boot exposing a REST API.
related_requirements.explanation: Built with Spring Boot 2.2.2 and Java OpenJDK 17, exposing the API for frontend clients.

related_requirements.requirement: Communication protocol is HTTP and data format is JSON.
related_requirements.explanation: Receives REST requests from the Frontend using HTTP and JSON formats.

related_requirements.requirement: Primary keys must be defined for User, Language, ClusterType, Application, Authority, Role, Brand, and Cluster tables.
related_requirements.explanation: Uses Domain Models and Repositories to interact with the database where these keys are enforced.

related_requirements.requirement: System guarantees that users cannot access data belonging to other clients; only data of the associated client is shown.
related_requirements.explanation: There is a specific schema for each microservice, and each client has its own group of schemas per microservice.

related_requirements.requirement: Primary keys must be defined for User, Language, ClusterType, Application, Authority, Role, Brand, and Cluster tables.
related_requirements.explanation: Stores data related to Users, Clusters, Roles, Applications, and Logs, enforcing table structures.

related_requirements.requirement: Each language_id in every content table must belong to an existing Language.
related_requirements.explanation: Stores data related to Languages, enforcing referential integrity.

related_requirements.requirement: Dates must be valid and cannot be later than the present.
related_requirements.explanation: Stores data including dates, ensuring validity at the persistence layer.

related_requirements.requirement: There cannot be elements of the same type with the same code in applicable tables.
related_requirements.explanation: Enforces uniqueness constraints on stored data elements.

related_requirements.requirement: Web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation with a minimum availability of 99.9%.
related_requirements.explanation: Provides persistent storage ensuring data integrity and availability.

related_requirements.requirement: Application must manage a strict separation of data for each client (no user can access data of other clients).
related_requirements.explanation: Schemas are isolated by microservice and client, physically separating data.

related_requirements.requirement: Project utilizes Cloud technology model for storage and resource management.
related_requirements.explanation: Hosts and orchestrates containerized microservices using cloud technology.

related_requirements.requirement: Web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation with a minimum availability of 99.9%.
related_requirements.explanation: Provides scalability and availability through orchestration.

related_requirements.requirement: Web application must support a large number of simultaneous users without degrading its performance.
related_requirements.explanation: Orchestration allows scaling resources to support large numbers of users.

related_requirements.requirement: Cloud provider for the project is Amazon Web Services (AWS).
related_requirements.explanation: Uses Amazon Web Services (AWS) specifically Amazon EKS.

related_requirements.requirement: Deployment is performed using Amazon EKS (Kubernetes).
related_requirements.explanation: Uses Amazon EKS (Elastic Kubernetes Service) for orchestration.
